user_story: As a Travel Coordinator, I want to view approved trip details with title, name, departure and destination cities, departure date, mode and vendor, so that I can manage confirmed trips
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Trip Details screen; When the list loads; Then each trip shows title, name, departure city, destination city, departure date, mode, vendor and status

user_story: As a Travel Coordinator, I want to filter trips by active or inactive employees, so that I can focus on the relevant employee set
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Trip Details screen; When I select Active employees or Inactive employees; Then the list is filtered to that employee status

user_story: As a Travel Coordinator, I want to filter trips by a From and To period, so that I can review trips within a specific date range
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Trip Details screen; When I pick a From and To date using the calendar and search; Then only trips within that period are shown

user_story: As a Travel Coordinator, I want to filter trips by department, so that I can review trips for a specific department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Trip Details screen; When I select a department and search; Then only trips for that department are listed

user_story: As a Travel Coordinator, I want to filter trips by status such as Pending for Vendor Confirmation, Travel Coordinator Process Initiated, Confirmed and Completed, so that I can track trips through the vendor confirmation lifecycle
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Trip Details screen; When I select a status and search; Then only trips with that status are displayed

user_story: As a Travel Coordinator, I want to confirm a trip as travel coordinator, so that the trip moves to the confirmed state for the vendor and traveller
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Trip Details screen; When I click Travel coordinator confirm for a trip; Then the trip status is updated to confirmed

user_story: As a Travel Coordinator, I want to search and reset the trip filters, so that I can apply criteria and quickly clear them
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filter criteria; When I click Search; Then the list reflects my criteria; And when I click Reset; Then all filters return to their defaults
